Protect I-V, Shell I-V, Phalanx, Haste/Haste II, Distract/Distract II, Refresh, Tier I Enspells based on the target monster's weakness.

Burning Blade, Red Lotus Blade, Savage Blade, Vorpal Blade
*Casts spells on himself only. If Curilla is present, will cast Haste/Phalanx/Refresh on her.

This makes him excellent for determining any of an enemy's elemental weaknesses (other than light and dark). Possibly strengths as well if he won't cast certain elements, even on their days or during their weather, on enemies with no elemental weaknesses.

shantotto.name: Shantotto

Trust: Windurst
Prerequisites Known:

*Trust: Ayame, Trust: Naji, Trust: Volker

shantotto.spells_raw:
single-target Elemental Magic nukes up to V in rapid succession, with a focus on high-power nukes.
**Does not cast Ancient Magic, Enfeebling Magic, Enhancing Magic, nor Area of Effect spells.
**Does not cast Drain, Aspir nor Aspir II.
**Does not cast Meteor.
shantotto.notable:
**Quickly depletes her MP, but becomes more conservative with spell tiers when the enemy's HP is low.
**Outside of battle, she can be released and resummoned to restore all of her MP, as long as her recast timer is ready.
**Cast spells related to the Threnody if present, but not as strictly as Ajido-Marujido does.
